action.description: The committee on TRN recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 8 Ayes: Representative(s) Kila, Miyake, Evslin, Grandinetti, Kitagawa, La Chica, Cochran, Pierick; Ayes with reservations: none; 1 Noes: Representative(s) Muraoka; and  Excused: none.
